column1: 「明日、雨が降るって。傘持ってきた？」
column2: 「あした、あめがふるって。かさもってきた？」
column3: 'Apparently it's going to rain tomorrow. Did you bring an umbrella?'
column4: って (casual quotation / topic marker / hearsay)
column5: Sentence + って (casual hearsay: と言っていた) / Noun + って (casual topic: というのは) / Verb + って (casual quotation: と言った)
column6: って: casual hearsay, reporting what someone heard
column7: って: casual hearsay, reporting what someone heard
column8: って = casual quotation/topic/hearsay; と = formal quotation; というのは = formal topic definition; とのことだ = formal hearsay reporting
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:って-slang source:authored frequency:top1k complexity:standard

column3: Tanaka-san, you know, is someone who's really considerate of others.

column2: 「はやくきてっていったのに。」「ごめん、でんしゃがおくれちゃって。」
column3: 'I told you to come early.' 'Sorry, the train ended up being late.'
